category_sources: Official liblouis.io homepage describes a braille translator, back-translator, formatter, and tables.
source_facts.description says Liblouis is an open-source braille translator and back-translator.
docs_sources: Official homepage links users to consult the documentation.
Official liblouis.io documentation hosts the Liblouis User's and Programmer's Manual.
